sqlchathistory.statement: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tblKundaliAiChatHistory ( id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, conversation_id VARCHAR(100), astrologer_id VARCHAR(3), local_chart_id VARCHAR(15), online_chart_id VARCHAR(15), title_text VARCHAR(255), description_text VARCHAR(255), module_name VARCHAR(255), user_id VARCHAR(255), time_stamp TEXT )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tblKundaliChatMessage( id INT, conversation_id VARCHAR(100), answer_id VARCHAR(10), question_text TEXT, answer_text TEXT, is_liked TINYINT(1), is_disliked TINYINT(1), time_stamp TEXT )
